test.name: get_time
test.objective: Check that current time can be obtained from PTP device associated with the tested network interface.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: set_time
test.objective: Check that time can be set for PTP device associated with the tested network interface.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: adj_setoffset
test.objective: Check that offset can be added to the current time of PTP device associated with the tested network interface.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: adj_frequency
test.objective: Check that frequency can be tuned for PTP device associated with the tested network interface.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: clock_caps
test.objective: Check that clock cababilities can be obtained for PTP device associated with the tested network interface.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known
No external timestamp channels
Pulse Per Second is not supported
Pulse Per Second is not supported
Frequency adjustment range is less than expected
No external timestamp channels
Pulse Per Second is not supported
Frequency adjustment range is less than expected

test.name: sfptpd
test.objective: Check that sfptpd can be used to synchronize clocks across network.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: sys_offset
test.objective: Check that PTP_SYS_OFFSET ioctl can be used to obtain samples of PTP device time and system time at the same moment.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: sys_offset_extended
test.objective: Check that PTP_SYS_OFFSET_EXTENDED ioctl can be used to obtain samples of PTP device time and system time at the same moment.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known

test.name: sys_offset_precise
test.objective: Check that PTP_SYS_OFFSET_PRECISE ioctl can be used to obtain PTP device time and system time at the same moment.

result.verdict: PTP device index is not known
PTP_SYS_OFFSET_PRECISE request is not supported
PTP_SYS_OFFSET_PRECISE request is not supported
PTP_SYS_OFFSET_PRECISE request is not supported

test.name: ptp4l
test.objective: Check that ptp4l can be used to synchronize clocks across network.

result.verdict: IUT: PTP device index is not known
Tester: PTP device index is not known
